name: Task Output Management
description: Creates and manages per-task output tabs in the UI, handles ANSI-stripped streaming output rendering and structured code diffs with syntax highlighting (green for additions, red for removals), supports Gemini image galleries, manages overflow when output exceeds the cap, and provides follow-up output injection.

  L44: AppendColoredOutput(string taskId, string text, Brush foreground, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void
  L308: TryInjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask child, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void  // Synchronous wrapper kept for backward compatibility (non-UI-thread callers).
  L384: InjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask parent, AgentTask child) -> void  // Synchronous wrapper kept for backward compatibility (non-UI-thread callers).

patterns: Tab-per-task with lazy recreation for running history tasks
dependencies: WPF RichTextBox and TabControl for rendering
